tagline: Bridging time zones with reggaeton beats and global hearts.
liner: Step into a digital romance where signal strength doesn't determine love. 'My Soul Lives In Seoul' is a high-energy anthem blending glossy K-Pop production with the infectious bounce of reggaeton dembow grooves. Navigate thirty-seven waiting messages, red batteries, and confusing camera angles in this playful tale of long-distance devotion. From anxious playfulness to bureaucratic determination at customs, the journey culminates in triumphant global harmony that transcends physical borders. It is a story where multilingual vocals—from Korean greetings to Spanish rhythms—weave a tapestry of connection that thrives even when Wi-Fi drops out.

bios.lead: Sings smooth pop-rap verses that wake the sleepy city up.
bios.back: Layers harmonies so thick they turn distance into a bridge.
bios.drums: Keeps the floor shaking. Never misses a downbeat in Seoul or Spain.
bios.perc: Adds tropical synth plucks and rhythmic unity to every drop.
bios.bass: Slides through time zones with punchy 808s that feel like hugs.
bios.synth: Paints glossy soundscapes where melancholic connection meets bright joy.
bios.other: Scatters multilingual vocal chops across the digital sky for texture.
bios.guitar: Plucks gentle melodies through customs lines and currency confusion.
bios.keys: Brings passionate rhythmic unity to the bridge's final stand.
